case_title: NICHOLAS WILLIAM WAYNE VS. XERCEO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WAYNE, NICHOLAS WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT XERCEO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAYNE, NICHOLAS WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XERCEO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $12,721.62 PRINCIPAL, $43.26 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,134.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
